loadout.name: Aint Nothing But Some Manacles Build
Palpatine Tickle Fingers
loadout.notes:
Get ready to feel like palpatine with this build.
1) Loop is simple use festival flight (envious arsenal/ attrition orbs) and winterbite projectile to charge up the dark meter
2) spam lightning surge and grenade with double or triple hands on if you can to charge up super and light meter.
3) pop transcendance for infinite melees if you still don't have super
4) once you get super just pop and go to work on ads and bosses for lawless frontier the super is very good against yellow bar enemies so don't save super because you will get it back very quickly if you popped transcendance and have a super pop your super during transcendance and throw your prismatic grenade for free weaken on bosses 

STATS - 200 super with 100 melee or close to 100 melee then put the rest in grenade or class if possible.
STORMDANCER'S BRACE is the exotic with the massive buff stormtrance and this exotic got its better than ever.
- use your nade as often as you can for extra tick damage
- energy weapon highly recommend dp smg with rewind rounds and jolting feedback to free jolting on enemies.
- artifact mods only really need dielectric, armorsmith, gravitic-voltaic charge, and elemental siphon.

loadout.name: Winter's Guille Insanely Strong Warlock Build
The Only Praxic Blade Warlock Build You Need
Perfect Winters Guile Build for -50 Grandmasters
A weapon from a more civilized age
loadout.notes:
Time to really crank up your lightsaber damage. Let's maximize it fully!

Use the lightsaber for literally everything. Final boss use your energy to shoot hands and balls. Can be uncivil discourse or whatever weapon you prefer.

GAMEPLAY LOOP:
Eat grenade, kill everything.

DPS SETUP:
Eat Grenade, Pop prismatic, throw prismatic grenade, pop song of flame, and RIP AND TEAR!

Impact core, offensive form, your choice of catalyst.
